mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refunds (payment_id,idempotency_key, amount, reason, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{amount}, #{reason}, #{status}::refund_status, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE refunds
payment_id = #{paymentId},
idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey},
amount = #{amount},
reason = #{reason},
status = #{status}::refund_status,
refunded_at = #{refundedAt},
updated_at = #{updatedAt}
WHERE id = #{id}
